annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under SDCL § 54-3-5.1 — 10% per year, fixed by statute (simple interest). Post-judgment default is Category B = 10% under SDCL 54-3-5.1. EXCLUSIONS from that section (these are NOT at the flat Category B judgment rate): (1)… Verify against the statute; not legal advice.
